mapper.select: select id, admin_id, news_title, news_content, news_source_url, news_category, news_type, published_at, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_news order by created_datetime desc
select id, news_title, news_content from tbl_news order by created_datetime desc limit 2
select id, admin_id, news_title, news_content, news_source_url, news_category, news_type, published_at, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_news where id = #{id}
